description: Restore 10 HP at the start of your next combat.
Increase SPEED by 1 for all party members.
Reveals the map of the next dungeon area.
Restores 5 HP to each party member between encounters.
Increase ATK by 1 for the Soldier for the rest of the run.
Restore 8 MP to all mages after each battle.
First enemy attack each combat has a 25% chance to miss.
All party members gain +3 ATK on the first round of combat.
Black Mage spells deal +20% damage for the rest of the run.
Soldier deals double damage when below 25% HP.
The first spell cast each combat automatically triggers twice.
